descriptions.client: TechEmpower load generator, swept toward saturation (measured single-query operating point = 104,000 req/s).
descriptions.svc: The web framework under test. Its concurrency pool is generous (512 / 0.2 ms => ~2.56M req/s), but it now also carries a CPU station: cpuCores 28 (the Citrine app box's hardware threads) x 1000 / cpuTimePerRequestMs 0.2692 ms => ~104,000 req/s. At one query per request the framework CPU (104k) binds BELOW the DB (118k), so the single-query ceiling is CPU-bound — the resource SDA previously could not express.
descriptions.db: One PostgreSQL server. concurrency (28) = the DB box's parallel-query slots; perRequestDuration (0.2373 ms) chosen so capacity = 28 / 0.2373 ms = 118,000 queries/s (fit from the measured 20-query point, 5,900 x 20). Single query => 1 query per request.
